title: Creating & Managing Deals
description: Learn how to create new deals, assign team members, update deal status, switch between grid and table views, and filter your deal pipeline.

steps.narration: Your deals pipeline is the command center for all active engagements. Here you can see your open deals at a glance, each showing the company, status, and owner.
Let's create a new deal. Click the New Deal button in the upper right to open the deal creation form.
Fill in the deal details. We'll name this one Cloud Migration Assessment and associate it with Meridian Dynamics since we're expanding our engagement with them.
After submitting, the new deal appears in your grid right away. AtlusDeck automatically sets the status to open and assigns you as the owner.

callout.text: New deal added to your pipeline

steps.narration: Click any deal card to open its overview page. Let's look at the Meridian Dynamics Q2 Digital Transformation Initiative to see the full deal context.
Back on the deals page, let's manage team assignments. The assign action on each deal card lets you add or change the team member responsible.
Assigning deals helps distribute workload and keeps the right people connected to each opportunity. Each team member sees only their assigned deals by default.
You can also update a deal's status directly from the grid. Changing a deal from open to won, lost, or abandoned keeps your pipeline accurate.

callout.text: Update deal status to track progress

steps.narration: Switch to table view for a more compact layout. The view toggle in the upper right lets you choose between the visual grid and a traditional table format.
Table view shows all your deals in a scannable list with sortable columns. This is ideal when you need to compare details across many deals quickly.
Use the status filter to narrow your view. Here we've filtered to show only won deals so you can see which engagements have closed successfully.
Clear the filter to see the full pipeline again. The deals page gives you everything you need to manage your active engagements in one place.
